task_completion.description: Create a forensic case named 'Concealed_Evidence_2024' with case number 'INV-HDF-009'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'New Case' wizard or main window showing the case name 'Concealed_Evidence_2024' and case number 'INV-HDF-009'.

task_completion.description: Add the disk image as a data source with the 'Hash Lookup' ingest module enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Add Data Source' wizard showing '/home/ga/evidence/hidden_files.dd' selected, and the 'Configure Ingest Modules' step showing 'Hash Lookup' checked.

task_completion.description: Identify regular files with the DOS 'Hidden' attribute set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy interface displaying the contents of the disk image, specifically highlighting or filtering for files with the hidden attribute (e.g., 'finances.csv' and 'password.txt').
Autopsy 'Export' dialog saving files to '/home/ga/Reports/hidden_exports/', or a terminal/file manager showing the extracted files ('finances.csv', 'password.txt') in that directory.

task_completion.description: Generate a pipe-delimited CSV report at /home/ga/Reports/concealed_files.csv with specific headers and hidden file details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the creation or contents of 'concealed_files.csv' with the header 'FILENAME|SIZE_BYTES|HAS_HIDDEN_ATTR|MD5_HASH' and rows for the hidden files with 'YES' for the attribute.

task_completion.description: Generate a summary report at /home/ga/Reports/concealment_summary.txt with file counts and an assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing 'concealment_summary.txt' containing 'TOTAL_HIDDEN_FILES: 2', 'TOTAL_NORMAL_FILES: 4', and a 1-2 sentence assessment regarding concealment intent.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI for analysis rather than relying solely on command-line tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy graphical interface being actively used to browse the disk image and view file attributes/hashes.

integrity.description: The agent extracted files using Autopsy's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent right-clicking files in Autopsy and selecting 'Extract File(s)' rather than manually mounting the image and copying files via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent retrieved MD5 hashes from the forensic tool rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The MD5 hashes entered into the CSV report should match the hashes visible in the Autopsy file metadata/results pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The disk image contains exactly 6 regular files. Exactly 2 files have the DOS 'Hidden' attribute set: 'finances.csv' and 'password.txt'. The remaining 4 files are normal. The CSV report should contain exactly these 2 hidden files. The summary report should state TOTAL_HIDDEN_FILES: 2 and TOTAL_NORMAL_FILES: 4.
